basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana Agricultural University (PJTAU) GIS Analyst Notification 2026 has been released on 04 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the PJTAU GIS Analyst Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. / B.E. / B.Tech. in Agriculture/ Agriculture Engineering / Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / Environmental Science / Environmental Engineering / Water Resources Engineering / Civil Engineering / Geoinformatics / Remote Sensing & GIS or equivalent subject, Minimum One year Experience in working with RS&GIS applications in agriculture.
qualification.details: GIS Analyst: B.Sc. / B.E. / B.Tech. in Agriculture/ Agriculture Engineering / Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / Environmental Science / Environmental Engineering / Water Resources Engineering / Civil Engineering / Geoinformatics / Remote Sensing & GIS or equivalent subject. Minimum One year Experience in working with RS&GIS applications in agriculture.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for PJTAU GIS Analyst recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the PJTAU GIS Analyst recruitment is scheduled for 11th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the GIS Analyst post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Sc. / B.E. / B.Tech. in relevant fields like Agriculture, Computer Science, Geoinformatics, or equivalent, with at least one year of experience in RS&GIS applications in agriculture.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the GIS Analyst position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the GIS Analyst post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the GIS Analyst role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the GIS Analyst post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the GIS Analyst position announced by PJTAU.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the PJTAU GIS Analyst recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the GIS Analyst post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the PJTAU office in Hyderabad, Telangana. Specific details regarding the exact venue and time will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The GIS Analyst position is a contract-based job.
